action.reasoning: Observation: Renderer adds (1-opacity) to RGB making white background, returns only comp_rgb without opacity. GT images have RGBA with transparent background. Analysis: Need to extract opacity to create proper RGBA output. The line `comp_rgb += 1 - opacity[..., None]` adds white background. I need to monkey-patch the renderer to also return opacity. Decision: Create custom _forward that returns both RGB (without background) and opacity, then save as RGBA.
